title: cohniella stacyi
intro: Cohniella stacyi, also known as desert marigold, is a flowering succulent plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cohniella stacyi are thought to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
